sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base64 (id Int32, encoded_value String, decoded_value String);
SELECT id, base64Decode(encoded_value) AS decoded_value FROM test_base64 WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_value LIKE 'Invalid%');
SELECT id, base64Decode(encoded_value) AS decoded_value FROM test_base64 HAVING decoded_value != ALL (SELECT base64Decode(encoded_value) FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, base64Decode(encoded_value) AS decoded_value FROM test_base64 WHERE (id + 2) != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_value IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_fuzz (a UInt64, b String, c Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_fuzz (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'QXJlIHlvdSB0aGVyZSE=', NULL), (2, 'B3IiIHRlc3Q=', 2);
SELECT a, base64Decode(b) FROM test_fuzz WHERE a != ALL (SELECT a FROM test_fuzz WHERE c IS NOT NULL);
SELECT a, base64Decode(b), count(*) FROM test_fuzz GROUP BY base64Decode(b) HAVING count(*) != ALL (SELECT count(*) FROM test_fuzz WHERE c IS NULL);
SELECT a, base64Decode(b) FROM test_fuzz WHERE base64Decode(b) != ALL (SELECT base64Decode(b) FROM test_fuzz WHERE a IS NOT NULL);
